nasb.text: Therefore be on the alert, remembering that night and day for a period of three years I did not cease to admonish each one with tears.

esv.text: Therefore be alert, remembering that for three years I did not cease night or day to admonish every one with tears.

cnv.text: 所以你們應當警醒，記念我三年之久，晝夜不停地帶著眼淚勸戒你們各人。

ccb.text: 所以你们一定要警醒，牢记这三年来我怎样昼夜不住地流着泪劝诫你们。

csbs.text: 所以你们要警醒，记住这三年来，我日夜不住地流着泪水劝诫你们每一个人。
